chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1632 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. However, perusal of prayer clause reflects that this petition was filed by the petitioner for demarcation of his agricultural land, details of which, mentioned in the para-2 of memo of the petition. Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG present in Court in connection with some other matters, waives notice and submits that recently, the Senior Member Board of Revenue, Sindh, through Notification No.DD(E&I)-HQ/BOR/2024/302, dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievance Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. This Cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, foti-khata-badal, demarcation of land, land partition, and solvency certificates. The establishment of this Cell provides an alternate, effective, and exhaustive remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issues. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of, leaving it open for the petitioner to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification by moving proper application, which shall be decided by the respondents within 30 days after receipt of such application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
